x4freetext: Gas target was operated at room temperature
and in a pressure range of 250-310 torr
The 17 and 150 um detectors used to perform
deltaE-E mass identification of the alpha-particles
and simultaneously used the 150 and 1500 um detectors
Compared with curves from phase shift analysis
